mapper.sql: pev.employee_id as pe_id, pev.vocational_name, pev.vocational_level, pev.evaluation_time, pev.evaluation_mechanism, pev.vocational_validity, pev.remarks, pev.new_vocational_flag, pev.attribute1, pev.attribute2, pev.attribute3, pev.enabled_flag, pev.id, pev.create_time, pev.create_by, pev.update_time, pev.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.vocational_name as ${tAlias}_vocational_name, ${tAlias}.vocational_level as ${tAlias}_vocational_level, ${tAlias}.evaluation_time as ${tAlias}_evaluation_time, ${tAlias}.evaluation_mechanism as ${tAlias}_evaluation_mechanism, ${tAlias}.vocational_validity as ${tAlias}_vocational_validity, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.new_vocational_flag as ${tAlias}_new_vocational_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
from pm_employee_vocational pev left join pm_employee_vocational_temp pevt on pev.id = pevt.vocational_id and pevt.enabled_flag = 1 and pevt.check_flag = 'D'
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_vocational (employee_id, vocational_name, vocational_level, evaluation_time, evaluation_mechanism, vocational_validity, remarks, new_vocational_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{vocationalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vocationalLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{evaluationMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vocationalValidity,jdbcType=DATE}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newVocationalFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_vocational set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, vocational_name = #{vocationalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vocational_level = #{vocationalLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluation_time = #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, evaluation_mechanism = #{evaluationMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vocational_validity = #{vocationalValidity,jdbcType=DATE}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_vocational_flag = #{newVocationalFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pev.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pev.evaluation_mechanism) > 0 then pev.evaluation_mechanism else null end as evaluation_mechanism, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pev.remarks) > 0 then pev.remarks else null end as remarks, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pev.vocational_level) > 0 then pev.vocational_level else null end as vocational_level, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pev.vocational_name) > 0 then pev.vocational_name else null end as vocational_name from pm_employee_vocational pev join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pev.employee_id where pev.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pev.evaluation_mechanism,pev.remarks,pev.vocational_level,pev.vocational_name ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
